notes: Chunk 31 complete 2026-06-06. Key regulatory coverage: MAPA/BARANTAN/DVS/SENASICA export certs; EU non-listed country FAVN titre test + 90-day wait; Japan AQS 180-day pathway (two vaccinations, AQS-designated lab, 40-day advance notification); South Korea QIAS (5-10 days quarantine for rabies-endemic origins; 1-3 days for EU-origin Italy). Routes 5322 -> 5397, pages 6109 -> 6185. Tier A remaining: 140 -> 115. Next chunk 32 (Template B, Visual Journey, Tier A). Blog Day 7 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
